# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: envoy.dataplane.goggleapis.com/v2alpha1
kind: EnvoyConfiguration
type: typed_configuration
typedExtension: @envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.TLSSocket

tlssocket:
  commonTlsContext:
    tlsVersion: v1.2
    minProtocolVersion: v1.2

transportSocket:
  name: envoy.transport_sockets.tcp
  typedConfig:
    @type: type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.tcp_proxy.v3.TcpProxy
    stats:
      aggregateTimers: true
      zone: outbound
    httpFilters:
    - name: envoy.filters.http.router
      typedConfig:
        @type: type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.routers.v3.Router
        routes:
          - match:
              prefix: "/"
            routeAction:
              cluster: api_gateway
    listenAddresses:
      - address:
          socketAddress:
            address: 0.0.0.0
            portValue: 80
    serviceClusterConfigs:
      - name: api_gateway
        connectTimeout: 1s
        type: strict_dns
        loadAssignment:
          clusterName: api_gateway
        transportSocket:
          idleTimeout: 30s
          maxConnectionsPerRouteSettings:
            perHostConnectionPoolSpec:
              maxConnections: 500
              maxRequestsPerConnectionSettings:
                requests: 10000
                code: ABORTED
          healthCheck:
            clusterName: api_gateway
